name: Ferulic Acid
description: A plant-based antioxidant that stabilizes and enhances the efficacy of Vitamins C and E.
scientificSummary: Ferulic acid doubles the UV photoprotection of Vitamin C and E while providing its own antioxidant activity.
mechanismOfAction: Scavenges reactive oxygen species and stabilizes ascorbic acid, preventing its oxidation and extending its activity.

seo.title: Ferulic Acid - Antioxidant Booster | Dew Theory
seo.description: Learn how Ferulic Acid supercharges Vitamin C and E for ultimate antioxidant protection.
